CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, identifier VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO users (name, identifier) VALUES ('Alice', '阿里');
SELECT * FROM users WHERE identifier = '阿里';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE identifier LIKE 'A%';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE identifier LIKE 'Б%';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE identifier IN ('阿里', 'Charlie');
SELECT name FROM users WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE identifier = 'Боб');
SELECT name FROM users WHERE identifier = (SELECT identifier FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice');
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, order_identifier VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO orders (user_id, order_identifier) VALUES (1, '注文001');
SELECT o.order_identifier FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE u.name = 'Alice';
SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.order_identifier) FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.name HAVING COUNT(o.order_identifier) > 0;
SELECT u.id, u.name FROM users u WHERE u.identifier LIKE 'C%' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id) > 0;
SELECT u.name FROM users u WHERE u.identifier = charset_recode('日本', 'UTF-8', 'UCS-2');
